ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinates of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinates of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location (in meters) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the location */,
  "city_code" TEXT /* City code or administrative code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather summary */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for which the summary applies */,
  "summary_1_3" TEXT /* Weather summary for days 1 to 3 */,
  "summary_4_6" TEXT /* Weather summary for days 4 to 6 */,
  "summary_7_9" TEXT /* Weather summary for days 7 to 9 */,
  "summary_10_12" TEXT /* Weather summary for days 10 to 12 */,
  "summary_13_15" TEXT /* Weather summary for days 13 to 15 */,
  "summary_16_18" TEXT /* Weather summary for days 16 to 18 */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date when the summary was generated */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_summaries_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather detail */,
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather summary this detail is part of */,
  "date" TEXT /* Specific date for the weather detail */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity (in percentage) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure (in hPa) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "sunrise" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  "sunset" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_details_summary_id FOREIGN KEY ("summary_id") REFERENCES weather_summaries ("summary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., consumer, business client) */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_subscription_level FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_level") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "subscription_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the subscription plan */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of what the subscription plan includes */,
  "validity_period" TEXT /* Duration of the subscription (e.g., 1 month, 6 months) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription is due for renewal */,
  "features" TEXT /* List of features included in the subscription plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of historical data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for which the data applies */,
  "date" TEXT /* Specific date for the historical data */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity (in percentage) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure (in hPa) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "sunrise" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  "sunset" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for which the analysis applies */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period analyzed */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period analyzed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the data analysis performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., temperature trend, precipitation analysis) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_accuracy" (
  "accuracy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accuracy record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for which the forecast applies */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Time when the forecast was made */,
  "actual_weather" TEXT /* Actual weather conditions on the forecast date */,
  "forecasted_weather" TEXT /* Forecasted weather conditions */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Score representing the accuracy of the forecast */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the forecasting model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accuracy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_accuracy_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
